creator: uberlord@gentoo.org
text:
utmp.h is very limiting, especially for UT_HOSTSIZE as it will not hold an ipv6 address or a long hostname. 

Fixing this should also fix bugs bin/68134, bin/53560 and bin/108743

Fix: I propose that the limits are increased to 32 for UT_NAMESIZE, UT_LINESIZE and to 256 for UT_HOSTSIZE. This should allow for future expansion.
How-To-Repeat: This is very obvious when you ssh into a FreeBSD box from another machine and you then re-login into it and it shows a truncated hostname or IPv6 address.
